master.intent: quote-first product ad with premium proof support
notes: Quote card is the hero persuasion block.
Proof bar sits close to CTA or product meta.

16:9._layout_note: Landscape split-panel layout: full-bleed source media on the left 40%, dark content panel on the right 60% with stacked elements (headline / eyebrow_rules / proof_bar / quote_card / section_header / body / badge_row / cta).
16:9._zone_scalers_note: Per-zone-id multipliers applied at render time to slot height + font-size (and any em-relative descendants). The slot budget calculator reads the same map so Gemini's max_chars for the eyebrow reflects the wider rendered glyphs. Adjust per ratio when the column visually under- or over-weights against the reference creative.

1.91:1._layout_note: Landscape split-panel layout — sibling of 16:9 with tighter vertical budget (524h vs 563h).

master.intent: creator or UGC on one side, product on the other, with native social energy
notes: UGC or creator media is the emotional anchor.
Quote bubble must stay pinned and readable.

master.intent: product-centered review density with multiple supporting review cards
notes: Review cards surround or flank hero.
Cards stay static even when hero is video.

master.intent: metric-led proof system with structured hierarchy and optional supportive media
notes: Metrics are the hero proof layer.
Support media is optional but helpful.
CTA should appear after numeric trust is established.

master.intent: creator-led recommendation with product support and trust ribbon
notes: Product sits as support or inset.
Trust ribbon should sit near handle, badges, or CTA.
